replacement_decision: Replace with deterministic local match/session/event abstractions
replacement_target: Local match runner, action queue, event bus, player/session ids
implementation_notes: Do not port Photon transport, lobby, room, RPC, or network ownership into headless. Any rule/card code that currently checks Photon state should receive explicit player/session/action context from Headless services.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references Photon/Pun/ExitGames; card/rule callers can run without PhotonNetwork, PhotonView, RPC attributes, room properties, or network callbacks.

replacement_target: None for local RL; optional future remote runner transport can use System.Net.WebSockets
headless_location: Headless/Runtime or separate runner project only if remote rollout is required
implementation_notes: Current WebSocketSharp usage belongs to Photon networking. Headless local training should not need sockets. If remote self-play orchestration is added later, keep it outside core engine.
completion_criteria: Core Headless project has no WebSocketSharp reference; local batch/scenario runners work in-process.

replacement_decision: Replace only if retained transport code needs it
headless_location: Outside Headless core unless transport layer is explicitly added
implementation_notes: Windows.* APIs are platform-specific and mostly transport/client related. Prefer cross-platform BCL APIs in a separate adapter if any non-Unity networking survives.
completion_criteria: Headless core compiles cross-platform without Windows.Foundation/Windows.Networking/Windows.Storage namespaces.

replacement_target: ILogSink, EngineTrace for textual diagnostics only
implementation_notes: TextMeshPro renders client text. Replace only meaningful log/status output with plain strings in trace/log services; no font/layout behavior is needed.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references TMPro or text rendering classes; diagnostics are plain strings.

implementation_notes: UIParticle/UIEffect/Unmask are visual-only UGUI effects. They should not influence deterministic game state.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references Coffee.UIExtensions; visual effect calls are not required for simulation.

replacement_target: Immediate state transition or scheduled engine task only when timing affected logic
implementation_notes: Tweens are presentation timing. If original code waits for tween completion before continuing logic, replace with deterministic task/event step rather than animation timing.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references DG.Tweening; logic sequencing uses EngineTaskRunner or direct state transitions.

implementation_notes: Shape rendering add-on. Not part of card/rule/action state.
3D layout/UI placement add-on. Not part of deterministic game logic.
Camera control is client presentation. No headless replacement required.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references Cinemachine or camera packages.

implementation_notes: Browser input should become deterministic/scripted/policy choice selection. No WebGL input bridge is needed inside core engine.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references WebGLInput; choices enter through IChoiceProvider or actions.

implementation_notes: Chat/name text filtering is client/social feature and outside local AI/RL simulation.
completion_criteria: No Headless code references ProfanityFilter; match simulation does not require chat text validation.

replacement_target: Card metadata loader without image decoding
implementation_notes: WebP/card images are visual assets. Headless card DB should load ids/text/rules, not decode display images.
completion_criteria: Headless data loading works from JSON/deck/banlist data without WebP package.

replacement_decision: Remove or replace with C# nullable annotations
replacement_target: Nullable reference types, XML docs if needed
headless_location: Any Headless file if annotations become useful
implementation_notes: JetBrains annotations are not runtime dependencies. Prefer built-in nullable annotations and compiler analysis.

replacement_decision: Keep only if a chosen .NET dependency requires it
replacement_target: Normal NuGet transitive dependency if needed
implementation_notes: Do not add preemptively. Current Headless build does not require it. If a future parser/library needs it, let NuGet resolve the dependency.
completion_criteria: Current Headless build succeeds without explicit Unsafe package reference.

replacement_decision: Do not carry Unity package registry into core engine
replacement_target: nuget.org or explicit PackageReference only if required
implementation_notes: Unity scoped registry is a Unity package restore concern, not a headless runtime dependency. For .NET, use normal NuGet packages only when the engine actually needs them.
completion_criteria: Headless project restore/build does not rely on Unity scoped registry.

replacement_decision: Review occurrence and map to Photon or local time/session concept
replacement_target: Likely Photon.Realtime or local deterministic clock/session
headless_location: Headless/Bridge or Headless/Services after source review
implementation_notes: The scan saw one unresolved Realtime symbol. If it is Photon.Realtime, remove/replace with local session objects. If it is a domain type, classify separately.
completion_criteria: The specific occurrence is manually classified and either removed from Headless scope or mapped to a concrete Headless service.

replacement_decision: Preserve domain meaning but replace UI implementation
implementation_notes: Although detected as non-Unity dependency, this is likely project UI/domain selection code. Do not ignore blindly. Preserve game-zone selection semantics and route decisions through Headless choice APIs.
completion_criteria: All SelectCardEffect-driven gameplay decisions can be expressed as ChoiceRequest/ChoiceResult without UI objects.
